## ERT1.2. En route capacity incentive scheme

The Austrian NSA reports a financial penalty of €1 120 177 for the ANSP because of the 2025 performance. The local incentive target for en route ATFM delays, due to CRSTMP causes only, was set at 0.14 mins/flight.

The NSA reports an achieved CRSTMP performance of 0.20 mins/flight using data from the ansperformance.eu dashboard including post ops adjustments.

\[NB The attribution of original delay causes on the ansperformance.eu dashboard is unverified\]
